---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or a change to existing behaviour
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem

<!-- What user-facing pain or workflow gap motivates this? Concrete example
of a thing you tried to do and couldn't. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What should the script / config / docs look like once this is done?
A small mock-config or pseudo-CLI is more useful than a vague description. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Things you ruled out and why. -->

## Scope check

- [ ] This is one cohesive feature, not five things bundled together
- [ ] It belongs in this script (not, say, a separate tool that pipes into it)
- [ ] It works for more than just one lab's specific setup
- [ ] It does NOT require breaking the existing config.json schema
      (or you describe a migration path)

## Willing to contribute?

- [ ] I can submit a PR
- [ ] I can help test
- [ ] Just suggesting the idea
